mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, prompt_id, name, description, template_text, variables, version, status, ab_test_config, created_at, updated_at FROM t_prompt_template WHERE prompt_id = #{promptId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, prompt_id, name, description, template_text, variables, version, status, ab_test_config, created_at, updated_at FROM t_prompt_template WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_prompt_template WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, prompt_id, name, description, template_text, variables, version, status, ab_test_config, created_at, updated_at FROM t_prompt_template WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND name = #{name} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE t_prompt_template SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, template_text = #{templateText}, variables = #{variablesJson}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE prompt_id = #{promptId} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE t_prompt_template SET version = #{version}, template_text = #{templateText}, variables = #{variablesJson}, status = 'PUBLISHED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE prompt_id = #{promptId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_prompt_template SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE prompt_id = #{promptId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_prompt_template SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE prompt_id = #{promptId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, prompt_id, name, description, template_text, variables, version, status, ab_test_config, created_at, updated_at FROM t_prompt_template WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND name = #{name} AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1
